headline: Concept-Based Explainability: TCAV and Concept Bottleneck Models
description: Concept-based explainability moves beyond pixel-level saliency maps to higher-level human-understandable concepts. TCAV quantifies whether a model "thinks" about stripes when classifying zebras, while Concept Bottleneck Models embed interpretable concept reasoning into the architecture itself.

citation.name: Interpretability Beyond Feature Attribution: Quantitative Testing with Concept Activation Vectors (TCAV)
Concept-based Explainable Artificial Intelligence: A Survey
